title: BELGIUM enforcement action against Non-Profit Foundation (1,000)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Belgian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 1,000 on a non-profit foundation. The DPA started an investigation after a complaint was lodged against the controller. The controller failed to appear at a hearing and to file the requested submission. Legal basis: Art. 31 GDPR.
dedupKey: belgium enforcement action against non profit foundation 1 000|2026-04-28
